title: Bomb squad called to RAF base after 'suspicious package' found

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Bomb squad called to RAF base after 'suspicious package' found. RAF Lossiemouth confirmed a cordon was in place around its base after the package was found during a routine security search.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Bomb squad called to RAF base after 'suspicious package' found
